length_bias_check.method: word count of option text before feedback marker

questions.objective_ref: Explain what it means when an AI gives different answers to the same question across multiple runs
Use the four-quadrant variation-temperature framework to interpret output patterns; Identify whether high or low output variation is a reliability problem, given the type of task
Distinguish tasks where variation signals failure from tasks where variation is expected and acceptable
Explain why consistent AI output does not guarantee correct output, and why ground-truth checking is required
Describe which measurement tools (accuracy, precision, recall) apply when quantifying reliability from variation data
Use the four-quadrant variation-temperature framework to interpret output patterns; Explain what it means when an AI gives different answers to the same question across multiple runs
